title: Refactor `abc9` pass
body:
* `abc9` is now a script pass containing the refactored result, pulling out many of the calls that the old `abc9` was doing internally, yet maintaining the property that it should be a drop-in replacement for `abc`
* New pass `abc9_exe` responsible for just executing external dep
* New pass `abc9_ops` which encapsulates many of the supporting tasks to prep the circuit for `abc9_exe` and to reintegrate the result back into the design
* New option `read_aiger -xaiger` for reading XAIGER extensions, no longer tightly coupled/dependent on ABC box definitions being present in design
* Many cleanups along the way

`abc9` now looks something like this:
```
    pre:
        scc -set_attr abc9_scc_id {}
        abc9_ops -mark_scc -prep_xaiger [-dff]    (option for -dff)
        select -set abc9_holes A:abc9_holes
        flatten -wb @abc9_holes
        techmap @abc9_holes
        abc9_ops -prep_dff    (only if -dff)
        opt -purge @abc9_holes
        aigmap
        wbflip @abc9_holes

    map:
        foreach module in selection
            write_xaiger -map <abc-temp-dir>/input.sym <abc-temp-dir>/input.xaig
            abc9_exe -cwd <abc-temp-dir> [options]
            read_aiger -xaiger -wideports -module_name <module-name>$abc9 -map <abc-temp-dir>/input.sym <abc-temp-dir>/output.aig
            abc9_ops -reintegrate

```

pre:
        scc -set_attr abc9_scc_id {}
        abc9_ops -mark_scc -prep_xaiger [-dff]    (option for -dff)
        select -set abc9_holes A:abc9_holes
        flatten -wb @abc9_holes
        techmap @abc9_holes
        abc9_ops -prep_dff    (only if -dff)
        opt -purge @abc9_holes
        aigmap
        wbflip @abc9_holes

    map:
        foreach module in selection
            write_xaiger -map <abc-temp-dir>/input.sym <abc-temp-dir>/input.xaig
            abc9_exe -cwd <abc-temp-dir> [options]
            read_aiger -xaiger -wideports -module_name <module-name>$abc9 -map <abc-temp-dir>/input.sym <abc-temp-dir>/output.aig
            abc9_ops -reintegrate
